title: Spell Flyer
short_description: A free online Flappy-Bird-style spelling arcade game: flap through the correctly spelled word, dodge the misspelling.
description: A real arcade game with the spelling built right into the flying. Tap, click or press Space to flap your bird through a sky of walls. Every wall has two openings — one shows a word spelled correctly, the other a sneaky common misspelling — and you have to steer through the correct one. Flap through the right word to score and build a combo; fly through the misspelling or crash into a wall and you lose a heart. Pick a grade band (Grade 1–2 everyday words, Grade 3 tricky words, Grade 4–5 spelling demons like receive, separate and necessary) and fly as far as you can. Reading and spelling become split-second reflexes instead of a worksheet. Great for kids in grades 1–5 practising sight words and commonly misspelled words. Finishing posts a score to the leaderboard for GP.
controls: Tap, click, or press Space (or the Up arrow) to flap. Steer your bird up and down to fly through the opening that shows the correctly spelled word.
